text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My work laptop has been running poorly as of
late, so I decide to buy a replacement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look through a catalog for my options, but my
eyes glaze over when I see the different models,
unable to make sense of the technical jargon...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh, so that piece of junk finally broke down?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The catalog seems to have piqued her interest,
and her eyes linger on its pages. I take the
opportunity to slide in a question while she's
engaged.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: No. And even if I did, I wouldn't give you any.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I point to a fairly priced model, which is proudly
labeled as a popular best seller.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Are you kiddin'? What do you need such a
high-spec model for? It'd just be a waste of
money.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You don't need a powerful CPU or a good
graphics card if all you're planning to use it for is
recordkeeping and drafting documents.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You should be lookin' for something that won't
strain your eyes. A simple, lightweight model with
an anti-glare screen would be more up your
alley...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering how reticent she usually is, it feels
like a wonder how easily the words tumble from
her mouth. I can't help but stare at her.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...
Tch, it's your laptop, so figure it out yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur looks more than ready to leave. There
must be something I can say to stop her!
choice_data_list: Can you tell me what "anti-glare" means?

Which spec is "lightweight" for? Memory?
Cost?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...You can't be serious right now.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Listen up, 'cause I'm only explainin' this once.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Think of it as a computer's brain. How smart that
brain is changes the price.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But knowin' the type of work you do, there's no
need for anything with high specs.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'd put that money into other things, if I were you.
choice_data_list: That makes sense... Thanks for the explanation!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Wipe that grin off your face. The hell's wrong with
you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...
Sure.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But there's no such thing as a free lunch in the
world.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you want me to tell you, you gotta do somethin'
for me too.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Buy this HDD for me. I've been wantin' a new one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My eyes nearly pop out of their sockets when I
see how much it costs!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Now. what was it you wanted to know the
definition of? "Anti-glare"?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you got any other words you don't know, I can
tell you. One term, one new computer part for
me. Great deal, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Frankly, I don't think my wallet can handle such
pricey demands, but I've kind of got my back to
the wall since I said I'd do "anything."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Geez. I'm just kidding, dummy.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Pfft.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Man, you're so freakin' desperate.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I just meant its normal old weight. As in, pick
something that doesn't physically weigh much.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hehe, dummy.
